◎简　　介  

　　The Amazing Race 7 was the seventh installment of the popular reality television show, The Amazing Race. This installment ran from March 1, 2005 to May 10, 2005.Filming began on November 20, 2004 and finished on December 19, 2004.In this edition of the race, a change was made to the non-elimination leg penalty.
